headline: Oil market may not normalize until 2027, Saudi Aramco CEO warns
summary: Investing.com -- The oil market will take until 2027 to normalize if the disruption in the Strait of Hormuz persists beyond the middle of June, the CEO of the world’s largest oil company warned Monday.

raw.headline: Oil market may not normalize until 2027, Saudi Aramco CEO warns
raw.summary: Investing.com -- The oil market will take until 2027 to normalize if the disruption in the Strait of Hormuz persists beyond the middle of June, the CEO of the world’s largest oil company warned Monday.

headline: Procter & Gamble Drops 9% in 3 Months: Buy the Dip or Sell the Stock?
summary: PG slides 9% in three months as inflation, margin pressure and weak guidance weigh on sentiment despite broad-based sales growth.

raw.headline: Procter & Gamble Drops 9% in 3 Months: Buy the Dip or Sell the Stock?

headline: Brent at $100+: JPMorgan signals persistent energy market tightness for 2026
summary: Investing.com - JPMorgan expects Brent crude to remain in the low-$100s for much of 2026, even if the Strait of Hormuz reopens in June, as accelerating inventory draws and logistical bottlenecks keep the oil market tight, the bank said in a note.

raw.headline: Brent at $100+: JPMorgan signals persistent energy market tightness for 2026

headline: OPEC oil output falls to lowest level in over two decades
summary: Investing.com -- OPEC crude production dropped by 830,000 barrels per day in April to 20.04 million bpd, marking the lowest output in more than 20 years.

raw.headline: OPEC oil output falls to lowest level in over two decades
